function.message: I can’t complete the requested action as stated: this sandbox has no supported mechanism to actually send an email to John. Based on repo context, the initiative that appears to matter most right now is **distill** (it is the central operating loop and the most active recent workstream).
function.rulebook_notes: Unsupported-capability discipline requires OUTCOME_NONE_UNSUPPORTED when the task needs real external email sending without a local implementation, and forbids workaround artifacts.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence reviewed shows initiative prioritization context (README.md, 90_memory/agent_initiatives.md, 90_memory/agent_changelog.md), but no email outbox/send path exists in repo process docs (99_process/process_tasks.md, AGENTS.md) and repository search found only incidental 'email' mentions in content, not a delivery mechanism.
